name: Frosty Orange Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Quaker Oats, uncooked (quick or old-fashioned)
1 quart Vanilla ice cream, soft (frozen), thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. For the crust: Heat oats in a shallow baking pan in a preheated moderate oven (350°F) for about 10 minutes. Combine the oats, coconut, sugar, and butter until crumbly. Press firmly onto the bottom and sides of a 9-inch pie plate. Chill.
2. For the filling: Spread half of the ice cream into the crust. Drizzle with 2 tablespoons of orange juice concentrate. Repeat layers once. Sprinkle with toasted coconut. Freeze until firm.
